purpose: Future merge validation must detect when the same account balance was edited differently on local and cloud and require review instead of silently choosing one.

expectedStagedResult.reason: The same account balance changed differently on local and cloud after the last known sync.

expectedReport.message: Account balance was edited on both sides and requires review.

safetyNotes: Do not recalculate balances during merge.
Do not choose a balance winner automatically.
